---
title: "set_persona.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\set_persona.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.58
---

## Intent
The `set_persona.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on set_persona. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via set_persona. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [personas](file://personas)

### Exports
- `set_persona`
